# Golang Install Submodule (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for files under `docs/zh/golang/install`.

## Docs

- [Install Overview](./index.md): Cross-platform Go installation overview and setup checklist.
- [Install on Linux](./linux.md): Linux installation methods with package and binary options.
- [Install on macOS](./macos.md): macOS installation methods including PKG and Homebrew.
- [Install on Windows](./windows.md): Windows installation methods including MSI and package managers.
- [Install Metadata](./_meta.json): Navigation metadata for installation pages.
- [This LLMs File](./llms.txt): Machine-readable index for this install directory.
